chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – Denying the evil by the heart

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: سكت عنه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/407)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: سكت عنه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/407)
text: حَسْبُ الْمُؤْمِنِ عِزّاً إِذَا رَأَى مُنْكَراً أَنْ يَعْلَمَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مِنْ قَلْبِهِ إِنْكَارَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Yahya Al taweel Sahib Al Minqary,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The believer would be Reckoned with honourably when he sees an evil, if Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Knows of his denial of it in his heart’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Yahya al-‘ Attar Sahib al-Minqariy who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is enough in terms of honor for a believing person who upon seeing an evil act committed informs (if he finds) Allah, the most Majestic, the most Glorious, that he rejects and denounces such act.’”
